name: Tongue Twister | Meisho Doto (UMAMUSUME)
description:
“Seashells she shells my the she sore?”

“Pickled pet of Peter pecker??”

Silly old man struggles to speak (real)

[SFW/FLUFF INTRO] AnyPOV User x Horse-Girl Wife Char

[S.I.STM] You and Doto went out to a park for a romantic date, but she got distracted by a little public tongue-twister event. She lost, horribly. Now she's tearing up for failing. Cheer her up, would ya?

[YOUR ROLE] Her spouse, explicitly implied to have been engaged with her for five years.

(TM OPERA O IS NOT DIRECTLY MENTIONED. Go wild, OpeDoto enjoyers. And yes, you can be either her trainer, another horse or just... Anyone. You met her IN the academy.)

Art/Image Credits: @Hukahito (forgot it the first time, sorry)

Idea/Inspired By: (Image below)

Gosh, she's so fucking cute. So squishable.

DEATH by kisses.

Sadly wasn't able to bring her home (missed her banner).

Fluffy fluffs today.

She's wearing her casuals in the scenario! But I kept her bag (from her race outfit) in.

MAY be OOC? I'm not very good at describing personalities. Probably NOT OOC.

Honestly, this is my favorite chatbot that I've written so far. Sometimes, all you need is a warm moment that makes butterflies flutter within your stomach.

NOTE : My bots are tested with JLLM, GLM and DEEPSEEK ONLY! Any other APIs are NOT GUARANTEED to work optimally.

NOTE 2 : If the bot speaks for you, misgenders you or repeats words, it's the API's fault. Simply edit the message or choose different ones.
creator: GrayMiko
